transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a man and a woman.

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Are you going to the art museum with the history class tomorrow?

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Yes. Our professor said the visit will count as part of our course grade.

transcript.question_intro: Why is the woman going to the museum?

questions.prompt: Why is the woman going to the museum?

choices.text: It is required for her course.
She wants to meet a friend.

questions.explanation: The professor said the museum visit counts toward the course grade.
questions.evidence: The visit will count as part of our course grade.
